threat_model.T1_epoch_terminal: One epoch-averaged gradient per round; 0 intermediate rows
threat_model.T1b_b1_client_terminal: B=1 per-sample terminal rows (full or budget-80 subset)
threat_model.T1p_partial_honest: Last p minibatch rows only; no mean imputation
threat_model.budget80: First 80 gradient rows (matched SHARD vs B=1)

T1_epoch_terminal.note: Stacked epoch means identify s_bar only; see paper/impossibility_t1.md

budget80_matched.interpretation: 80 B=1 terminal rows vs 80 SHARD intermediate rows (first rows in epoch-major order).

T1_epoch_terminal.note: Stacked epoch means identify s_bar only; see paper/impossibility_t1.md

budget80_matched.interpretation: 80 B=1 terminal rows vs 80 SHARD intermediate rows (first rows in epoch-major order).
